---
title: "sociodemografiske_karakteristika"
subtitle: "`sociodemografiske_karakteristika`"
description: "sociodemografiske_karakteristika"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/sociodemografiske_karakteristika/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                               | Title                            | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|------------------------------------|----------------------------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                            | The unique name of the event     | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `center`                           | Research center                  | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `socde_postal_code`                | socde_postal_code                | string | Postcode of the participant, self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `socde_living_with_others`         | socde_living_with_others         | string | Participant lives with other people. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `socde_living_with_partner`        | socde_living_with_partner        | string | Participant lives with spouse. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `socde_living_with_children_u16`   | socde_living_with_children_u16   | string | Participant lives with child or children under 16 years of age. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `socde_living_with_others_16plus`  | socde_living_with_others_16plus  | string | Participant lives with other persons aged 16 years or older (not spouse, cohabiting partner, or significant other). Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                         |
| `socde_have_children`              | socde_have_children              | string | Participant has children, including those living at home and those not living at home. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `socde_born_in_dk`                 | socde_born_in_dk                 | string | Participant was born in Denmark. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `socde_country_of_birth`           | socde_country_of_birth           | string | Country where the participant was born. Self-reported by participant. Baseline (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `socde_mother_born_in_dk`          | socde_mother_born_in_dk          | string | Participant's mother was born in Denmark. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `socde_mother_country_of_birth`    | socde_mother_country_of_birth    | string | Country where the participant's mother was born. Participant may write "don't know" if unknown. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                             |
| `socde_father_born_in_dk`          | socde_father_born_in_dk          | string | Participant's father was born in Denmark. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `socde_father_country_of_birth`    | socde_father_country_of_birth    | string | Country where the participant's father was born. Participant may write "don't know" if unknown. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                             |
| `socde_education_school`           | socde_education_school           | string | Participant's highest level of school education. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `socde_education_postschool`       | socde_education_postschool       | string | Participant has completed an education beyond school or youth education. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `socde_education_postschool_other` | socde_education_postschool_other | string | If participant selected "other" for education beyond school or youth education, specify which. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                              |
| `socde_currently_studying`         | socde_currently_studying         | string | Participant is currently enrolled in an education program. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `socde_employment_status`          | socde_employment_status          | string | Participant's current employment status. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `socde_employment_status_other`    | socde_employment_status_other    | string | If participant selected "other" for current employment status, specify which. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `socde_work_shift`                 | socde_work_shift                 | string | Usual time of day the participant works in their main occupation. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `socde_work_shift_other`           | socde_work_shift_other           | string | If participant selected "other" for usual time of day worked in main occupation, specify which. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                             |
| `socde_sport_activity`             | socde_sport_activity             | string | Participant currently engages in sports or physical activities either in a club or independently (e.g., running, ball games, fitness, gymnastics, powerwalking, dance, yoga). Do not include cycling as transportation or regular walking. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                  |
| `socde_sports_club`                | socde_sports_club                | string | Participant has participated in any clubs, organizations, or groups within the past year, meeting others for shared leisure activities or voluntary work (e.g., sports club, art club, running group, knitting club, political group, or aid organization). Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4). |
| `socde_sports_club_frequency`      | socde_sports_club_frequency      | string | Frequency of participant's attendance in clubs, organizations, or groups over the past year. Self-reported by participant. Baseline visit (V4).                                                                                                                                                                |

: Fields in the `sociodemografiske_karakteristika` resource.
